title: croton ramillatus
intro: Croton ramillatus, also known as the Wild Croton or Panama Croton, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. Its medicinal properties are derived from its sap, which contains a compound called ingenol mebutate, a potent anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent. The health benefits of Croton ramillatus include treating skin conditions such as warts, eczema, and acne, as well as providing relief from pain, inflammation, and infections. In herbal preparations, the sap is often used topically to create ointments, creams, and salves, or it can be consumed as a tincture or tea to promote overall health and well-being.
